commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And God gave Solomon wisdom and exceedingly great understanding, and largeness of heart, even as the sand that is on the seashore. Hart; magnanimity, which pride often attempts to imitate, and is therefore designated by the same expression, Proverbs xxi. The genius of Solomon was also most penetrating and comprehensive. (Calmet) Ænomaus thus addresses Apollo, "Thou who knowest, both the number of the sands and the extent of the sea who understandest the dumb, and hearest the man who has not spoken. "(Eusebius, præp. ) (Haydock).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
